helpful: Provisioned petition.txt included the full appendix (Fifth Circuit and district-court opinions), which made the vehicle analysis possible without any live retrieval
statpack per-fee-class and relist-count cuts gave a clean anchor for a paid, never-relisted, long-conference petition
gaps: fedcourts query has no free-text or issue-based filter, so finding topically similar cert petitions (e.g. prior section 1981 public-accommodations petitions and their fates) is not possible from the corpus; the statpack's salience-band table referenced in the prompt is also not present in the committed statpack.md
notes: Forward cell; no BIO on the docket (response due 2026-07-01, case distributed 2026-07-15 for the 2026-09-28 long conference), which itself is a mild denial signal.
